title: Afterhours Ending
shortDescription: A dreamlike office space turned restful sanctuary, softened with furnishings, paintings and the sound of gentle rain.
atmosphere: Tranquil and calming: muted colors, drooping willows and soft rain creating an overwhelming sense of weary comfort.
tips: A safe haven for rest. Move gently — don't disturb the peaceful atmosphere or try to wake from this dreamlike state.

title: Self-Automated Trade
shortDescription: A Victorian indoor market run by hostile entities acting as traders, open on a strict schedule with violent closures.
atmosphere: Commercial yet threatening — entities trade grudgingly while staying predatory, and closing time means forced eviction.
tips: Trade fairly, don't linger, and leave before 9 PM closing. Cheating a trader gets you killed on the spot; re-entry after eviction is fatal.

title: The Sunken Submarine
shortDescription: A functional sunken nuclear submarine on the seafloor, stocked with endless food and crewed by a friendly permanent staff.
atmosphere: Deep underwater, dim artificial light and the constant creak of pressure, occasionally watched by a colossal entity outside.
tips: Stay calm if the Great Observer appears at a window. Use the escape hatch to reach Level 7 — brace for the water pressure.

title: The Shifting Hedge Maze
shortDescription: A sprawling hedge maze of tall dark-green walls with shifting routes and fog, dotted with safe zones and rare specialty parks.
atmosphere: Perpetual fog around tall hedges makes for disorienting paths; safe zones offer respite, but rare 'darkening' events bring entity invasions.
tips: Head for Safety Parks for supplies and shelter. Never climb the hedges. Watch for Skin-Stealers slipping past park protections during darkening events.

title: Brilliant Evermore
shortDescription: A barren polluted wasteland of extreme weather, abandoned buildings holding supplies, and dangerous robotic guardians.
atmosphere: A desolate desert under toxic smog, brutal heat and acidic waterways, haunted by radio broadcasts hinting at ecological collapse.
tips: Shelter in buildings for filtration and supplies. Disable RoboPets' solar panels to stop them. Ration bottled water and cover up from the sun.

title: Rivergate Tower
shortDescription: A 31-floor office tower with a modern lobby and interconnected upper floors — mostly safe, its Facelings quietly at work.
atmosphere: Corporate calm in clean architecture; Facelings play mundane office workers as the higher floors grow more spacious and orderly.
tips: Avoid the hostile Britagne Royaume on floor 14. The boss's office computer holds undocumented level information.

title: Hallways of Time
shortDescription: Miles of locked hallways stocked with keys and supplies, where meeting your past or future self is a real, dangerous risk.
atmosphere: Isolated and disorienting; time flows unevenly here, breeding confusion and unsettling encounters with yourself.
tips: Find keys matching the colored or coded locks. Never harm a past or future version of yourself. Keep checking doors for a way out.

title: Muted Lake
shortDescription: A frigid, unnervingly still lake in a dark forest that swallows all sound and hides an unidentified aquatic threat.
atmosphere: Oppressively silent, faintly metallic-smelling; sound vanishes into the depths, leaving palpable dread.
tips: Avoid this level entirely. Don't approach or enter the water — prolonged exposure can cause temporary or permanent mutism.

title: Dreaded Park
shortDescription: An autumn park of narrow paths and public facilities, hiding parasitic organisms that dangerously warp cognition and behavior.
atmosphere: A desolate autumn landscape of scattered lighting and vegetation — familiar at first, slowly breeding confusion and aggression.
tips: Never drink any liquid found here. Watch your companions for behavior changes. Find the exit quickly and don't linger.

title: Newly Renovated Home
shortDescription: A two-storey renovated house presented as a fresh safe haven, recently cleared of whatever infested it before.
atmosphere: Welcoming yet faintly uncanny domestic comfort, with hints of something dark beneath the cheerful renovation story.
tips: Enter by simply thinking of 'home'. Exit through the old oak tree in the backyard. Stay cautious despite the reassuring facade.
